description: You are an SRE preparing a post-incident review dashboard to visualize the blast radius of a recent database outage. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Post-Incident Blast Radius' that correlates infrastructure tiers with the period where database CPU utilization exceeded 80%. The dashboard must include a graph titled 'DB Saturation Window' showing servers.rds_database.cpu.utilization with a red vertical band aliased 'SLA Breach' highlighting utilization above 80%. Include a second graph titled 'Impact on Web Traffic' showing servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1 overlaid with the same 80% CPU saturation window aliased 'DB Saturated'. Include a third graph titled 'Load Balancer Demand' showing the request rate for servers.load_balancer.requests.count overlaid with the same 80% CPU saturation window aliased 'DB Saturated'. Save the dashboard when complete.
